problem: How many positive integers, including $1,$ are divisors of both $40$ and $72?$

classified_questions.question: What does it mean for a positive integer to be a divisor of another positive integer?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Can you list all the positive integers that are factors of $40$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you list all the positive integers that are factors of $72$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Are there any numbers that are common factors of $40$ and $72$? If so, what are they?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many positive integers are common factors of $40$ and $72$, including $1$?
classified_questions.label: b
